name: World Legacy Trap Globe
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>遺</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>物</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>に<ruby lang="jp"><rb>蠢</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>うごめ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>く<ruby lang="jp"><rb>罠</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>わな</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Shuffle into the Deck, 5 of your "World Legacy" cards with different names that are banished, in your hand or GY, and/or face-up on your field, except "World Legacy Trap Globe", then draw 2 cards. You can only activate 1 "World Legacy Trap Globe" per turn.
eff: Shuffle into the Deck, 5 of your "World Legacy" cards with different names that are banished, in your hand or GY, and/or face-up on your field, except "World Legacy Trap Globe", then draw 2 cards. You can only activate 1 "World Legacy Trap Globe" per turn.

action: Returns the player's banished cards to the Deck by effect
Returns from your hand to your Deck
Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
Returns from your field to your Deck
